summary: This week in AI, significant developments include the call for a global AI watchdog, advancements in AI-powered features, and concerns over data center expansion. Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI for alleged trade secret theft also made headlines.
insight: The increasing integration of AI into various industries and aspects of life underscores the need for regulatory frameworks and ethical considerations to ensure responsible AI development and deployment.
highlights: Demis Hassabis advocates for a global AI watchdog led by the US
New York enacts the first statewide moratorium on new data centers
Apple sues OpenAI over alleged theft of trade secrets

articles.title: Google’s Demis Hassabis says it’s time for a global AI watchdog — led by the US
articles.description:
